ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight #12345
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Below are the details of your upcoming flight:

• **Flight Number:** SH1234
• **Date:** 15 May 2026
• **Departure:** New York (JFK) – 08:30 AM
• **Arrival:** London Heathrow (LHR) – 08:15 PM (GMT+1)
• **Gate:** B12
• **Seat:** 14A (Window)
• **Baggage Allowance:** 1 checked bag (up to 23 kg) & 1 carry‑on

**Check‑in**: 24 hours before departure at <URL>

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your itinerary, please contact us at support@skyhigh.com or call +1 212‑555‑0198.

Safe travels,

SkyHigh Airlines Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Outstanding QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

We have detected an unpaid invoice for your company. To avoid service interruption, please review the invoice details and remit payment immediately.

• **Invoice #**: QB‑2026‑045
• **Date Issued**: 12 April 2026
• **Due Date**: 30 April 2026
• **Amount**: $3,250.00
• **Payment Link**: <URL>

Please note that failure to pay within 48 hours will result in suspension of your QuickBooks Online subscription. The link above directs you to a secure payment portal. If you believe this is an error, contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,

QuickBooks Billing Department
support@quickbooks.com
